title: Design System: Candera — Botanical Scent Studio

display.purpose: Hero headlines only. The most prominent typographic statement on any page.

body.purpose: All prose content. DM Sans light, 1.75 line-height.

label.purpose: Button text, CTA labels, small navigation, form labels.

editorial.purpose: Pull quotes, maker's notes, editorial asides.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default card and raised surface shadow. The 1px pseudo-border is essential.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Subtle elevation for hovered small elements, tooltips.

shadows.name: lg
shadows.purpose: Modals, dialogs, floating panels. Noticeably lifted.

shadows.name: button-hover
shadows.purpose: CTA button hover state. Paired with -translate-y-0.5 lift.

motion.name: ease-enter
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and entrances.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Use for main conversion actions like 'Buy on Etsy' or 'Shop Now'.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { background: #141412; color: #f5f2ed; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; height: 52px; padding: 16px 40px; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px -12px rgba(20, 20, 18, 0.25); transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: #a8502b; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px -12px rgba(20, 20, 18, 0.35); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a8502b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-cta:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ember CTA Button
components.description: Conversion-focused CTA with ember accent background. Use for promotional or urgency-driven actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ember { background: #a8502b; color: #f5f2ed; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; height: 52px; padding: 16px 40px; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px -12px rgba(20, 20, 18, 0.25); transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ember:hover { background: #141412; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px -12px rgba(20, 20, 18, 0.35); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ember:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a8502b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ember:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-input { background: rgba(245, 242, 237, 0.5); color: #141412; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 300; padding: 12px 16px; height: 48px; border: 1px solid rgba(218, 203, 184, 0.3); border-radius: 2px; outline: none; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5f6459; } .ds-input:focus { background: #fdfbf7; border-color: rgba(168, 80, 43, 0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(168, 80, 43, 0.3); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Product listing card with image, name, tagline, scent notes, and price.
components.html:
No. 014

Blood Orange + Vetiver

bergamotcedar
$48
components.css: .ds-product-card { background: #fdfbf7; border-radius: 2px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(20, 20, 18, 0.06), 0 0 0 1px rgba(20, 20, 18, 0.04); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(20, 20, 18, 0.1), 0 0 0 1px rgba(20, 20, 18, 0.06); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-product-card-image { aspect-ratio: 4/5; background: #e2ddd6; width: 100%; } .ds-product-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-product-card-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 400; font-style: italic; color: #141412; margin: 0; } .ds-product-card-subtitle { font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-style: italic; color: #5f6459; margin: 4px 0 8px; } .ds-product-card-notes { display: flex; gap: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-chip { background: #f5f2ed; color: #141412; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; } .ds-product-card-price { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: #141412; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Primary navigation link. Used in the site header.
components.html: JournalProductsAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #141412; text-decoration: none; padding: 12px 0; position: relative; transition: color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 8px; left: 50%; width: 0; height: 1px; background: #141412; transition: width 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transform: translateX(-50%); } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { width: 100%; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a8502b; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Grain Texture Overlay
components.description: Subtle film grain noise overlay applied globally for tactile atmosphere.
components.css: .ds-grain { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; opacity: 0.04; mix-blend-mode: overlay; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); background-repeat: repeat; }

narrative.overview:
Candera's design language is the confidence of a design studio that happens to make candles. It borrows from the editorial world — generous whitespace, sharp typography, art-direction-forward composition — and applies it to the sensory experience of botanical scent. The page should feel like opening a carefully bound monograph: composed, intentional, worth taking time with.

The palette is warm without being rustic, refined without being cold. Near-black body text on a warm paper ground anchors every page in legibility. Accents in copper and muted rose arrive sparingly, like an illuminated initial in a manuscript — present when they matter, absent when they don't.

This system explicitly rejects: generic mass-market candle aesthetics (farmhouse visuals, Mason jar tropes, stock-photo candle imagery), the DTC SaaS cliché of super-white hyper-minimal pages, and any ornament that doesn't serve the product.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial typography as the primary design material — Fraunces italic at generous scales
Near-zero border radius; the only curvature is a 2px micro-radius that says 'designed,' not 'softened'
Warm paper-toned backgrounds (vellum, linen) with a subtle film grain texture for tactility
Grounded shadows that make surfaces feel like physical objects on the page
Sparse, intentional color — the page breathes by being mostly ink on paper

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: The ember and rose accents are used on ≤10% of any given screen. Their rarity is the point — when they appear, they mean something.

rules.name: The Ink-on-Paper Rule
rules.body: Obsidian text on vellum background. No dark-mode-as-default, no light-on-dark text blocks except as deliberate section mood shifts.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow-by-Default Rule
rules.body: The tiny uppercase tracked section kicker is reserved for deliberate brand voice, not generated as default scaffolding on every section.

rules.name: The 70ch Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Body text max-width is 70 characters. No paragraph should span the full viewport width.

rules.name: The Grounded-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are at rest. Shadows appear as responses to state. No floating elements at rest.

rules.name: The Mood-Fallback Rule
rules.body: Any component consuming --mood-fg (or -bg / -accent) must pair it with a literal color fallback — var(--mood-fg, #141412), never a bare var(--mood-fg). light-editorial's --mood-fg: inherit can resolve to an invalid value depending on ancestor context.

dos: Do use obsidian (#141412) for body text against vellum (#f5f2ed) or linen (#fdfbf7) backgrounds.
Do use ember (#dd7d52) or ember-strong (#a8502b) as the primary accent, limited to ≤10% of any given screen.
Do keep body text line length at 70ch maximum.
Do use Fraunces italic for all display and heading text.
Do use DM Sans light (300) for body text.
Do include visible :focus-visible ring system on every interactive element.
Do handle all six UI states (empty, loading, error, success, focus, disabled) for every interactive component.
Do use the card shadow (1px pseudo-border + soft drop) for cards and raised surfaces.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion: reduce for all non-essential motion.
donts: Don't use generic mass-market candle aesthetics — no farmhouse visuals, Mason jar tropes, or stock-photo candle imagery.
Don't use a warm-tinted off-white body background as a default move. Vellum is a specific color choice.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use glassmorphism or decorative blur effects.
Don't use the tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't use border-radius greater than 2px on cards, inputs, or sections.
Don't pair border + box-shadow with blur ≥ 16px on the same element.
Don't use repeating-linear-gradient stripe backgrounds or sketchy SVG illustrations.
Don't use arbitrary font sizes that fall between documented type-ramp steps, e.g. text-[1.85rem]. Normalize to the nearest ramp step instead — title (1.953rem) covers this range.
